# ArchiveHeader.EntryFilterData.entryAttributes(_:)

**Case**

An enumeration that represents entry attributes.

## Declaration

```swift
case entryAttributes(ArchiveHeader.EntryAttributes)
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **ArchiveHeader.EntryFilterData.entryXAT(_:)**: An enumeration that represents extended attributes.
- **ArchiveHeader.EntryFilterData.header(_:)**: An enumeration that represents an archive header.
